title: Netflix Tops Google's Year in Search 2025 with 'Monster,' 'Squid Game,' and 'KPop Demon Hunters'
text: Netflix maintained its dominance in Google's annual search rankings. The streaming platform claimed the top three most-searched TV shows globally: Monster: The Ed Gein Story at number 1, Squid Game 3 at number 2, and Adolescence at number 3. For movies, Netflix secured two entries in the global top 10, with Happy Gilmore 2 appearing at number 6 globally. However, in the United States specifically, Netflix's KPop Demon Hunters topped the movie charts, described as Netflix's most successful ever movie. The article notes that Netflix has more series in the top 10 globally than anyone else, reflecting the platform's continued cultural influence. Notably, these rankings measure search interest rather than actual viewership data, as they derive from top-trending searches and published annually by Google.
